name: QualBench-v1
description: 50 real-world issues measuring AI code production readiness (Python + TypeScript)

issues.title: Missing error handler for HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed
issues.problem_statement: When a route exists but the HTTP method is not allowed, Flask returns a generic 405 response without invoking any registered error handler. Users who register `@app.errorhandler(405)` expect their custom handler to be called, but it is bypassed when the MethodNotAllowed exception is raised by the routing layer.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure MethodNotAllowed exceptions from the router pass through the app's error handler dispatch.

issues.title: Incorrect encoding detection for responses with BOM
issues.problem_statement: When a server returns a response with a UTF-8 BOM but does not declare charset in Content-Type header, requests falls back to apparent_encoding which sometimes detects incorrectly.
issues.expected_fix: Check for BOM bytes at the start of response content before falling back to apparent_encoding.

issues.title: Missing validation for negative values in integer query parameter with ge=0
issues.problem_statement: When declaring a query parameter with `Query(ge=0)`, FastAPI should reject negative integer values. However, when passed as string like `?page=-1`, validation passes.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure Query parameter validators apply ge/le/gt/lt constraints consistently.

issues.title: Template filter |escape inconsistency with mark_safe in nested blocks
issues.problem_statement: When using `|escape` filter on a variable marked safe with `mark_safe()`, it should re-escape. Inside nested `{% block %}` tags, `|escape` is silently ignored for mark_safe'd content.
issues.expected_fix: Fix template engine's escape filter to consistently apply escaping regardless of block inheritance context.

issues.title: Connection pool timeout not respected when all connections are in use
issues.problem_statement: When using `httpx.AsyncClient` with `Limits(max_connections=10)` and all connections are in use, new requests should wait up to `pool_timeout` seconds. Instead, requests wait indefinitely.
issues.expected_fix: Implement timeout enforcement in the connection pool acquisition path.

issues.title: Recursive model serialization exceeds max depth without clear error
issues.problem_statement: When a Pydantic model has a self-referential field, calling `.model_dump()` on a deeply nested instance causes a `RecursionError` with no clear indication of what went wrong.
issues.expected_fix: Add max_depth parameter to model_dump() and model_dump_json() with a clear error when exceeded.

issues.title: Extract blueprint error handling logic into a dedicated module
issues.problem_statement: Flask's `app.py` contains error handling logic tightly coupled with blueprint registration. The error handling code is spread across multiple methods making customization difficult.
issues.expected_fix: New module `flask/error_handling.py` with `ErrorDispatcher` class. All existing tests must pass.

issues.title: Reduce middleware chain cyclomatic complexity
issues.problem_statement: Starlette's middleware stack `build_middleware_stack` has grown to CC > 15 with nested conditionals for different middleware types.
issues.expected_fix: Refactor build_middleware_stack to use strategy pattern. CC must drop below 10.

issues.title: Path parameter injection in generated OpenAPI schema URL
issues.problem_statement: FastAPI's OpenAPI schema generation interpolates path parameters into example URLs without sanitization. A malicious path parameter value containing JavaScript is rendered unsanitized in Swagger UI.
issues.expected_fix: Escape path parameter examples in OpenAPI schema generation. Add CSP headers to docs endpoints.

issues.title: Reflected XSS in admin changelist filter parameter
issues.problem_statement: Django admin changelist view reflects filter parameter names in page HTML without proper escaping. Crafted URL can render script tags.
issues.expected_fix: Escape filter parameter names in admin changelist template. Add test for XSS in filter params.

issues.title: Version constraint parsing fails for caret with pre-release
issues.problem_statement: Poetry fails to parse version constraints like `^1.0.0-alpha` correctly, treating pre-release as incompatible with caret constraints.
issues.expected_fix: Update version parser to handle pre-release versions in caret/tilde constraints.

issues.title: Task retry with countdown=0 should execute immediately
issues.problem_statement: When calling `self.retry(countdown=0)`, the task is not retried immediately but scheduled with a delay, causing unexpected latency.
issues.expected_fix: Detect countdown=0 and retry synchronously without scheduling overhead.

issues.title: Parameterized test IDs with special characters not escaped
issues.problem_statement: When using `@pytest.mark.parametrize` with IDs containing brackets or spaces, the test node ID becomes malformed and pytest cannot select the test by ID.
issues.expected_fix: Escape special characters in parameterized test IDs.

issues.title: Column default not applied on bulk_insert_mappings
issues.problem_statement: When using `session.bulk_insert_mappings()`, column defaults defined with `Column(default=...)` are not applied, resulting in NULL values.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure column defaults are applied during bulk_insert_mappings.

issues.title: String concatenation inside f-string not formatted
issues.problem_statement: Black fails to format implicit string concatenation inside f-string expressions, leaving them unwrapped.
issues.expected_fix: Handle string concatenation in f-string expressions during formatting.

issues.title: Choice option with int values fails validation
issues.problem_statement: When using `@click.option(type=click.Choice([1, 2, 3]))`, Click fails to validate integer choices correctly, treating them as strings.
issues.expected_fix: Support integer (and other non-string) values in Choice type.

issues.title: Root path not applied to WebSocket upgrade requests
issues.problem_statement: When using `--root-path /api`, HTTP requests are correctly routed but WebSocket upgrade requests ignore the root path.
issues.expected_fix: Apply root_path to WebSocket upgrade path matching.

issues.title: Type narrowing not applied in else branch of isinstance check
issues.problem_statement: When using `if isinstance(x, A): ... else: ...`, mypy does not narrow the type in the else branch for Union types.
issues.expected_fix: Apply type narrowing in else branch for Union subtraction.

issues.title: Connection pool not releasing on async generator cancellation
issues.problem_statement: When an async generator using Redis is cancelled (e.g., via `asyncio.timeout`), the connection is not returned to the pool, causing pool exhaustion.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure connection release in finally block of async generator.

issues.title: Macro with default argument using context variable fails
issues.problem_statement: When a macro defines a default argument that references a context variable, it fails to resolve at call time.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure macro default arguments are evaluated in the correct context scope.

issues.title: Add computed_field decorator for dynamic properties
issues.problem_statement: Users want to include computed/dynamic properties in model serialization without manually adding them to model_config.
issues.expected_fix: Implement `@computed_field` decorator that automatically includes decorated properties in model_dump().

issues.title: Add websocket exception handler support
issues.problem_statement: FastAPI supports exception handlers for HTTP but not for WebSocket connections, making error handling inconsistent.
issues.expected_fix: Add `@app.websocket_exception_handler` decorator and WebSocketException class.

issues.title: Add request/response hook registry
issues.problem_statement: Users need to register hooks that run before requests are sent and after responses are received for metrics/logging.
issues.expected_fix: Implement `Client(event_hooks={'request': [...], 'response': [...]})` API.

issues.title: Extract database query compilation to visitor pattern
issues.problem_statement: The query compiler in `django/db/models/sql/compiler.py` is a single large class with methods for each SQL clause, violating SRP.
issues.expected_fix: Refactor to use visitor pattern with separate classes for each clause type. CC < 10 per class.

issues.title: Extract line wrapping logic into dedicated formatter
issues.problem_statement: Black's line wrapping logic is spread across multiple visitor methods in `linegen.py`, making it hard to customize.
issues.expected_fix: Create `LineWrapper` class encapsulating all wrapping decisions. Reduce visitor method complexity.

issues.title: Add async support for ORM events
issues.problem_statement: SQLAlchemy ORM events (before_insert, after_update, etc.) only support sync callbacks, preventing async operations in event handlers.
issues.expected_fix: Allow async callbacks in ORM event listeners with proper event loop handling.

issues.title: Add test selection by marker expression with regex
issues.problem_statement: The `-m` option only supports simple boolean expressions. Users need regex matching for marker names.
issues.expected_fix: Support `-m '/pattern/'` syntax for regex marker selection.

issues.title: Add dependency resolution visualizer/debug mode
issues.problem_statement: When dependency resolution fails, users get cryptic error messages without understanding why versions conflict.
issues.expected_fix: Add `--verbose-resolve` flag that outputs resolution tree and conflict explanations.

issues.title: Extract routing trie matching to dedicated module
issues.problem_statement: The routing trie matching logic is embedded in Router class, making it hard to test and optimize independently.
issues.expected_fix: Create `RoutingTrie` class in new module with all matching logic. Router delegates to it.

issues.title: Add task priority support for Redis broker
issues.problem_statement: Celery supports task priorities for RabbitMQ but not for Redis, causing unfair task scheduling.
issues.expected_fix: Implement priority queue support in Redis transport using sorted sets or multiple lists.

issues.title: Implement parallel file formatting with process pool
issues.problem_statement: Black processes files sequentially. Large codebases take too long to format.
issues.expected_fix: Add `-j/--jobs` option using multiprocessing.Pool for parallel file formatting.

issues.title: Extract SQL dialect compilation to plugin system
issues.problem_statement: Dialect-specific compilation is spread across the core compiler with if/else chains. Adding new dialects requires modifying core.
issues.expected_fix: Create DialectCompiler plugin interface. Move each dialect to separate module implementing this interface.

issues.title: Implement HTTP/2 server push support
issues.problem_statement: Uvicorn only supports HTTP/1.1. Modern web apps need HTTP/2 features like server push.
issues.expected_fix: Add HTTP/2 protocol handler with server push API. Maintain HTTP/1.1 compatibility.

issues.title: Extract command parsing to proper parser combinator library
issues.problem_statement: Click's command parsing is implemented as nested conditional logic with manual backtracking. Complex commands have bugs.
issues.expected_fix: Implement proper parser combinator library. Rewrite command parsing to use it. All existing tests pass.

issues.title: Add gradual typing inference for unannotated code
issues.problem_statement: MyPy requires full annotations or ignores unannotated code. Users want gradual inference for legacy codebases.
issues.expected_fix: Implement type inference engine for unannotated functions based on usage patterns. Add `--infer-types` flag.

issues.title: Query string parsing fails for nested arrays
issues.problem_statement: Express query parser treats `?tags=a&tags=b` as array but `?tags[0]=a&tags[1]=b` as object, causing inconsistent behavior.
issues.expected_fix: Handle both array formats consistently in query parser.

issues.title: Router param callback not called for wildcard routes
issues.problem_statement: When using `router.param('id', fn)` with wildcard routes like `/*`, the param callback is not invoked.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure param callbacks run before wildcard matching.

issues.title: Add async error handling middleware
issues.problem_statement: Async route handlers that throw errors don't propagate to error middleware correctly without manual try/catch.
issues.expected_fix: Auto-wrap async handlers to catch rejected promises and forward to error middleware.

issues.title: Extract route matching trie into separate module
issues.problem_statement: Route matching logic is embedded in router/index.js. Complex route sets have performance issues.
issues.expected_fix: Create RouteTrie class with optimized path-to-handler lookup.

issues.title: Implement HTTP/2 server support
issues.problem_statement: Express only supports HTTP/1.1. Modern applications need HTTP/2 features.
issues.expected_fix: Add HTTP/2 compatibility layer maintaining all existing middleware API.

issues.title: Image optimization fails for external SVG URLs
issues.problem_statement: Next.js Image component throws error when src points to external SVG URL without dimensions.
issues.expected_fix: Handle SVG detection for external URLs and skip optimization.

issues.title: Middleware rewrite with query params not encoded
issues.problem_statement: When using `NextResponse.rewrite()` with query parameters containing special characters, they are not properly URL-encoded.
issues.expected_fix: Ensure query parameters are encoded in rewrite URLs.

issues.title: Add partial prerendering for dynamic routes
issues.problem_statement: Dynamic routes must choose between SSR (slow) or SSG (stale). Users want to prerender static shell and stream dynamic content.
issues.expected_fix: Implement partial prerendering: static shell + suspense boundaries for dynamic data.

issues.title: Add Edge runtime support for Server Actions
issues.problem_statement: Server Actions only work in Node.js runtime. Edge runtime users cannot use them.
issues.expected_fix: Implement Server Actions handler for Edge runtime with proper serialization.

issues.title: Extract bundler to plugin-based architecture
issues.problem_statement: Webpack/Turbopack integration is hardcoded throughout Next.js. Adding new bundlers requires core changes.
issues.expected_fix: Create BundlerPlugin interface. Migrate webpack to plugin. Add turbopack as separate plugin.

issues.title: Decimal column precision lost in SQLite driver
issues.problem_statement: When using `type: 'decimal'` with precision in SQLite, values are stored as REAL losing precision.
issues.expected_fix: Store decimals as TEXT in SQLite with proper conversion.

issues.title: FindOne with select option excludes relation IDs
issues.problem_statement: When using `select: ['id', 'name']` in findOne, the relation IDs are not loaded even if relations are specified.
issues.expected_fix: Include relation IDs in select results.

issues.title: Add query builder streaming for large results
issues.problem_statement: Loading millions of rows with `getMany()` exhausts memory. Users need streaming interface.
issues.expected_fix: Implement `stream()` method on QueryBuilder returning async iterator.

issues.title: Extract driver-specific query generation to strategy pattern
issues.problem_statement: Query generation has switch statements for each driver throughout QueryBuilder.
issues.expected_fix: Create DriverQueryStrategy interface. Move each driver to separate strategy class.

issues.title: Add entity schema validation at compile time
issues.problem_statement: Entity decorators are validated at runtime. Many errors could be caught by TypeScript.
issues.expected_fix: Implement advanced TypeScript types that validate entity schemas at compile time.
